name: chunknet
description: Chunknet is a wallet-based P2P cloud storage desktop app with encrypted chunks, peer discovery, and manifest sync.
author: Diya Ashour

scripts.transfers:streaming: node scripts/enable-streaming-transfers.cjs && node scripts/fix-large-preview.cjs && node scripts/fix-download-paths.cjs && node scripts/enable-parallel-streaming-upload.cjs
scripts.prestart:electron: node scripts/enable-streaming-transfers.cjs && node scripts/fix-large-preview.cjs && node scripts/fix-download-paths.cjs && node scripts/enable-parallel-streaming-upload.cjs && node scripts/repair-encrypted-manifests.js && node scripts/remove-bad-encrypted-manifests.js
scripts.dev:electron: node scripts/enable-streaming-transfers.cjs && node scripts/fix-large-preview.cjs && node scripts/fix-download-paths.cjs && node scripts/enable-parallel-streaming-upload.cjs && concurrently "pnpm dev" "pnpm paypal:server" "powershell -NoProfile -Command Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; node scripts/repair-encrypted-manifests.js; node scripts/remove-bad-encrypted-manifests.js; electron ."
scripts.electron:dev: node scripts/enable-streaming-transfers.cjs && node scripts/fix-large-preview.cjs && node scripts/fix-download-paths.cjs && node scripts/enable-parallel-streaming-upload.cjs && concurrently "pnpm dev" "pnpm paypal:server" "powershell -NoProfile -Command Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; node scripts/repair-encrypted-manifests.js; node scripts/remove-bad-encrypted-manifests.js; electron ."
scripts.build:electron: node scripts/enable-streaming-transfers.cjs && node scripts/fix-large-preview.cjs && node scripts/fix-download-paths.cjs && node scripts/enable-parallel-streaming-upload.cjs && vite build && electron-builder
